choices.text: While I was walking, the rain started.
When I was walking, the rain started.
While I walked, the rain started.
When I walked, the rain started.

questions.explanation: Правильно: 'While I was walking' (длительный процесс в Past Continuous). 'When' используется для короткого события ('the rain started' в Past Simple), но в данном случае 'while' требует длительного процесса.

choices.text: She was cooking while her husband arrived.
She was cooking when her husband arrived.
She cooked while her husband arrived.
She cooked when her husband arrived.

questions.explanation: Правильно: 'She was cooking when her husband arrived.' (Past Continuous для длительного процесса 'was cooking', 'when' для короткого события 'arrived').

questions.prompt: Какой вариант правильно описывает ситуацию: 'Он читал книгу, когда телефон зазвонил'?

choices.text: He read a book while the phone rang.
He was reading a book when the phone rang.
He read a book when the phone rang.
He was reading a book while the phone rang.

questions.explanation: Правильно: 'He was reading a book when the phone rang.' (Past Continuous 'was reading' для длительного процесса, 'when' для короткого события 'rang').

choices.text: While we were having dinner, it started to rain.
We were having dinner when it started to rain.
When we were having dinner, it started to rain.
We had dinner when it started to rain.

questions.explanation: Ошибка: 'When we were having dinner' (использование 'when' с длительным процессом). Правильно: 'While we were having dinner' или 'We were having dinner when it started'.

questions.prompt: Как правильно закончить предложение: 'I was watching TV ______ the power went out.'?

choices.text: while
when
as
because

questions.explanation: Правильно: 'when' для короткого события 'the power went out' (Past Simple). 'While' требует длительного процесса, но здесь 'went out' — краткое действие.

questions.prompt: Какой вариант соответствует правилу: 'While + Past Continuous, when + Past Simple'?

choices.text: While she was sleeping, the alarm rang.
She was sleeping when the alarm rang.
She slept when the alarm rang.
While she slept, the alarm rang.

questions.explanation: Правильно: 'She was sleeping when the alarm rang.' (Past Continuous 'was sleeping' + 'when' для краткого события 'rang').

choices.text: While I was driving, I saw a cat.
I was driving when I saw a cat.
When I was driving, I saw a cat.
I drove when I saw a cat.

questions.explanation: Правильно: 'While I was driving, I saw a cat.' (длительный процесс 'was driving' с 'while', 'saw' — короткое действие).

choices.text: While he was cooking, the doorbell rang.
He was cooking when the doorbell rang.
While he cooked, the doorbell rang.
He cooked when the doorbell rang.

questions.explanation: Ошибка: 'While he cooked' (Past Simple вместо Past Continuous). Правильно: 'While he was cooking' (длительный процесс).

questions.prompt: Как правильно: 'Она писала письмо, когда зазвонил телефон'?

choices.text: She was writing a letter while the phone rang.
She was writing a letter when the phone rang.
She wrote a letter when the phone rang.
She wrote a letter while the phone rang.

questions.explanation: Правильно: 'She was writing a letter when the phone rang.' (Past Continuous 'was writing' для длительного процесса, 'when' для короткого события 'rang').

questions.prompt: Какой вариант соответствует правилу 'when' для коротких событий?

choices.text: While the sun was shining, we played.
The sun was shining when we played.
We played when the sun was shining.
We were playing when the sun shone.

questions.explanation: Правильно: 'We were playing when the sun shone.' ('when' для короткого события 'shone', Past Continuous 'were playing' для длительного процесса).
